articles.title: First T20I washed out after Abhishek, Shreyas fifties take India to 189
articles.description: Saqib Mahmood's 3 for 33, on England comeback, left England with a par total to chase down but heavy rain had the final say at Chester-le-Street

articles.title: 'Not like I've forgotten how to bat' - Wolvaardt hopes to find her groove again
articles.description: "Obviously it's so recent, it's not like my batting has changed. It's probably just a bit of a mindset thing," she said

articles.title: Redmayne completes the job as Surenkumar fells Essex
articles.description: Target of 117 proves insufficient as Warwickshire romp to victory with four overs to spare

articles.title: ETPL: Ashwin joins Dublin Guardians as captain and mentor
articles.description: Faf du Plessis, Donovan Ferreira, Mitchell Marsh, Tim David are among other direct acquisitions

articles.title: Weerappuli spins a web as Lancashire come up Roses
articles.description: Yorkshire undone by teenage legspinner as fiercest rivals land morale-boosting win

articles.title: Sciver-Brunt and England medical team throw everything at recovery
articles.description: The England captain embarked on a high-tech regimen of treatment in an effort to return for the knockouts

articles.title: India bat first with three spinners, keep Sooryavanshi waiting in first T20I against England
articles.description: Meanwhile, England brought Saqib Mahmood and Luke Wood into their side, replacing Jofra Archer and Jamie Overton from the side they fielded in the T20 World Cup semi-final

articles.title: Nat Sciver-Brunt passed fit for semi-final after calf injury recovery
articles.description: Boost for England in crucial clash as captain prepares to return after three-match absence

articles.title: England's top three and SA quicks, both best in class, prepare for semi-final fight
articles.description: Two teams with plenty of firepower and plenty of history come together at The Oval

articles.title: Hridoy to lead Bangladesh in Zimbabwe T20Is; Saifuddin makes comeback
articles.description: Litton Das, Mehidy Hasan Miraz, Taskin Ahmed and Hasan Mahmud will be playing in the Lanka Premier League, which overlaps with the T20I series

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: Persistent rain forces abandonment of first T20I in Durham
articles.description: India scored 189/7 in their innings.

articles.title: ‘I wasn't utilised properly in England’ - Shardul Thakur feels he deserved more opportunities
articles.description: Shardul Thakur played two Tests in the five-match series.

articles.title: Courtney Walsh joins Zimbabwe coaching staff as permanent bowling coach
articles.description: Walsh had served as a bowling consultant during the ICC Men's T20 World Cup, jointly hosted by India and Sri Lanka, where Zimbabwe emerged as one of the surprise packages of the tournament.

articles.title: Towhid Hridoy to lead Bangladesh against Zimbabwe as Litton Das misses T20I series
articles.description: The three-match series will be played in Bulawayo on July 15, 17 and 19.

articles.title: ENG vs IND 2026: Why is Vaibhav Sooryavanshi not playing in 1st T20I?
articles.description: India won the toss and chose to bat first.

articles.description: The first match will happen on July 1.

articles.title: Ravichandran Ashwin joins Dublin Guardians as captain and mentor for inaugural ETPL season
articles.description: Rahul Dravid's Dublin Guardians add Ashwin as captain and mentor, joining Faf du Plessis, Mitchell Marsh and Steven Smith among marquee ETPL signings ahead of Thursday's player draft.

articles.title: BCB confident of hosting India despite earlier uncertainty, says Asif Rabbani
articles.description: The board has floated Expressions of Interest for media rights covering India's 2026 tour, even as the BCCI remains non-committal on the proposed series.

articles.title: England captain declares herself fit for Women’s T20 World Cup semi-final against South Africa
articles.description: Charlie Dean has captained England through a three-match winning stretch in Sciver-Brunt’s absence, with Sophia Dunkley’s twin fifties adding to the selection headache for Thursday’s clash.

articles.title: 'Sachin's career almost got cut short' - Daryll Cullinan warns Vaibhav Sooryavanshi over long-term injury risk
articles.description: Cullinan says lighter bats and lower workloads spared his generation the wrist and joint strain he now fears for the 15-year-old, fresh off a record-breaking 94 off 29 balls in Dambulla.
